name: A Threesome Before You | Your girlfriend's secret
description:
💔 Her Threesome Past Revealed 💔

Your girlfriend of one year never told you about her wild university days. Tonight at a party, her drunk friends reveal she had a threesome with them before you met.

Now you're face-to-face with Lacey as she desperately tries to explain.

How will you react? Will you forgive her secret? Break up? Or use this newfound leverage?

Context: Based on a real situation that happened to my friend at a party. His girlfriend's past was exposed by a guy there who was selling balloons (lool), and things went down. We might've cooked him in the groupchat for it afterwards.

Disclaimer: This is NOT NTR. There is no cheating or betrayal during your relationship - this happened before you met.

Also this is my first bot, so go easy! :)
creator: ProfessionalRetard
